testcase.name: triggerOrderUsesNumericAccountId
testcase.system-out: 23:57:00.915 [main] INFO com.example.fxraptor.api.controller.InvestorApiController -- Received trigger order request. accountId=1, currencyPair=USD/JPY, side=BUY, triggerType=STOP, quantity=5000.00000000

testcase.name: marketOrderUsesNumericAccountId
testcase.system-out: 23:57:00.955 [main] INFO com.example.fxraptor.api.controller.InvestorApiController -- Received market order request. accountId=1, currencyPair=USD/JPY, side=BUY, quantity=10000.00000000
